widgetData.source_sentence: This system connects customers in need of repairs with technicians in fields such as electricity, plumbing, air conditioning, furniture, etc. The system also supports scheduling, online payments, and service quality reviews...
sentences: FPT Multi Conference (FMC) is a multi-disciplinary online conference system that connects speakers, experts, and participants across various fields. The main objectives of the system include: Creating an online conference platform: Providing a virtual space for organizing and attending conferences and events. Professional conference management: Supporting registration, participant management, notifications, and conference progress tracking. Integration of online payment: Allowing users to securely pay fees for scientific paper evaluations and conference organization through popular payment gateways. Enhancing interaction and networking: Offering features such as AI Chat, Q&A sessions, comments, and opinion surveys to improve engagement.

Book a Service: Customers post a repair request, The system notifies technicians, The technician confirms acceptance of the job. Online Consultation: Customers and technicians chat or video call to discuss details. Perform the Repair: The technician arrives at the location, Completes the job, Updates the status on the system. Payment & Review: Customers pay online, Rate the service quality. Handle Complaints. If a dispute arises, Admin intervenes and resolves the issue.

Research Material: The focus of the research should be on effective methods and current solutions for developing a used vehicle sales platform. An elaborate project blueprint and system design that includes precise feature demands and technical details. This encompasses frontend and backend frameworks, data architectures, user pathways, and integration plans. The result should also include guidelines for executing secure transactions, enhancing SEO, and developing an admin interface for managing the platform. Every query sent to SQL needs to be escaped to prevent SQL Injection.

widgetData.source_sentence: User Registration & Authentication. Register an account, log in, and recover forgotten passwords. Manage personal profiles and track learning progress. Learning Materials. Browse course catalogs and select courses. Access lessons in text, video, or interactive coding exercises. Practice & Assignments. Solve exercises categorized by difficulty level. Use the integrated online editor for coding directly in the browser. Run & Submit Code. Write and test code using the online editor. Submit solutions for automatic grading. Progress Tracking & Leaderboard (optional). Course Management. Create, edit, and delete courses. Upload learning materials in text or video format. Assignment & Test Case Management. Create, edit, and manage exercises. Define test cases for automatic grading. Student Management. View student lists and monitor progress. Review submitted assignments and provide feedback. Grading & Evaluation System. Review system-generated scores. Adjust grading rules and test cases if necessary. Integrated Code Editor. Supports Java, Python, and JavaScript. Syntax highlighting and code suggestions. Enables code execution directly in the browser. Server-Side Execution. Uses ProcessBuilder to execute Java/Python/JavaScript code. Optionally uses Docker for isolated environments to enhance security. Implements execution time limits to prevent infinite loops. Test Case Validation. The system executes submitted code against predefined test cases. If the output matches the expected results, the system assigns a score. Scoring Criteria. Correctness: Compares output with expected results. Performance: Evaluates execution time and memory usage. Code Quality: Optionally analyzes code style and efficiency. Feedback & Reports. Displays scores and evaluation results immediately. Highlights errors (if any) to help learners improve their solutions.
sentences: In the digital age, the demand for writing and reading novels online is growing rapidly. Traditional reading platforms are no longer sufficient to meet the interactive and personalized needs of modern readers. At the same time, authors, especially newcomers, face many challenges in finding a suitable platform to publish and promote their works. Many authors rely on social media platforms or personal websites to share their works, but these platforms lack advanced support tools such as copyright protection, content monetization, or effective reader engagement. On the other hand, readers also struggle to find novels that match their personal interests, track the progress of their favorite authors, or participate in in-depth discussions about the content. Facing this challenge, our team has undertaken the project: "Build the InkWave library system that allows users to write and read novels online using ReactJS and ASP.NET" with the goal of creating a platform that meets the needs of both authors and readers, enhances reading culture in society, and helps us develop our own skills. Develop a novel library website with a user-friendly and intuitive interface. Allow users to write and share their own novels. Enable users to create accounts, rate, and comment on stories. Support searching and categorizing stories by genre, author, and popularity. Provide full ownership and control over novel creation. Ensure system performance, security, and scalability. Technology/algorithm. Front-end: ReactJS TypeScript. Back-end: ASP.NET Core API. Version Control: GitHub. CI/CD Tools: Azure DevOps.

User Authentication and Authorization Secure login system with role-based permissions. Bot Agent Deployment and Registration Streamlined process for installing and registering automation agents across the organization. Real-time Monitoring of Bot Activities Live dashboard showing bot status, performance, and execution progress. Execution Logging and Reporting Comprehensive logging of all automation activities with customizable reporting. Centralized Configuration Management Single location to manage all environment settings, credentials, and parameters. Package Distribution System Secure repository for storing and deploying automation packages to agents. Scheduling - Tools for scheduling automation tasks. Status Notifications and Alerts Customizable notification system for automation success, failures, and performance issues. Performance Analytics and Metrics Dashboards and reports showing automation performance, trends, and optimization opportunities. Role-based Access Control Granular permission system ensuring users can only access appropriate resources. Audit Trail and Activity History Comprehensive logging of user activities and system changes for security and compliance. Multi-environment Support Isolated development, testing, and production environments. Multi-Tenant Architecture Data isolation between tenants at the database level.
Building CodeVerse - An Online Programming Learning System with Live Coding and Assessment using Java Spring Boot, ReactJS, and MySQL.

widgetData.source_sentence: VirtualMeet - Versatile Virtual Meeting Platform using ASP.NET Core API, Angular, WebRTC, SignalR, MongoDB and SQL Server.
sentences: Personal Task Management Website uses NodeJs, ReactJs, RESTful API, MongoDB.
MediFlow: Hospital Examination and Injection Process Management System using ReactJS, .NET, AWS, PostgreSQL.
VirtualMeet - Multi-functional Virtual Meeting Platform utilizing ASP.NET Core API, Angular, WebRTC, SignalR, MongoDB, and SQL Server.

widgetData.source_sentence: Building a used car sales system in Da Nang city, using React, .Net, SQL Server.
sentences: User Management: User registration, login, profile management, and roles (buyer, seller, admin). Car Listings: Sellers can create, update, and delete car listings with details like make, model, price, and images. Admins can approve listings. Search and Filters: Advanced search and filtering by criteria such as price, model, and location, with sorting options. Car Details Page: Detailed car info, images, contact seller option, and vehicle history. Communication: In-app messaging, notifications, and test drive scheduling. Transactions: Price negotiation, secure payment processing, and invoice generation. Admin Panel: Admin tools for user and listing management, analytics, and content moderation. Reviews and Ratings: Ratings and reviews for sellers and listings, with admin moderation. SEO and Marketing: SEO-optimized pages, social sharing, and email marketing.
Web App: Vaadin (Java), Language: Java, Database: PostgreSQL, Cloud: AWS
Developing FCareerConnect – A smart job-matching platform integrated with virtual workspaces, built using NestJS, NextJS, PostgreSQL, WebRTC, and WebSocket technologies.

sentences: Create a student management system for high school utilizing Microservice architecture, Spring Boot, Next.js, Docker, and MySQL.

Online Payment: Make online payments through secure payment gateways. User Information Management: View and manage user information. Registration/Login: Secure sign-up and login system for all users. Course Management: Instructors can create, edit, and manage courses, exercises, and tests. Course Access: Students can buy and access courses with lectures, exercises, tests, and Q&A. Course Rating: Students can rate and review courses. Admin’s Management: Manage users, approve/edit/delete courses, block users, and create AI content. Speech Practice: Practice speaking with real-time speech recognition (Speechnote API). AI Content Generation: Auto-generate exercises and tests using Gemini API.

Monitoring Progress & Ranking Board (optional). Course Administration. Develop, modify, and remove courses. Submit educational resources in either text or video format. Management of Assignments and Test Cases. Develop, modify, and oversee exercises. Create test scenarios for automated assessment. Student Administration. Shows scores and assessment results instantly. Identifies mistakes (if present) to assist learners in enhancing their answers.
